_comment: M&A acquirer profile. Strictest across every category. Any overdue filing fails. Used before buying a company or taking a controlling stake.

_notes._profile: Use for: acquisitions, management buyouts, strategic investment, taking controlling stakes. Strictest profile. One fail is usually enough to WATCH.
_notes._diff_from_default: Zero tolerance on overdue filings. Appointment-count threshold tightened to 8. All category weights bumped. Historic disqualification window 15yr. Charges watched across 12 months.
